audit.recurrent_advance: predict_act_value called every step on obs[:,4:7]; hidden advances from observation only (independent of which action is executed)
audit.alias_note: STAY=NOOP/FIRE, UP=RIGHT/RIGHTFIRE, DOWN=LEFT/LEFTFIRE; no UPFIRE/DOWNFIRE. Uniform over 6 EXACT actions => equal mass on the 3 groups (2 aliases each).

reset_life.note: Pong has no ALE lives; episodes end on game over / truncation

audit.decision_state_selector: ball_present & ball moving right (dx>0) & ball_x>=120 (Stage-1F/1H clone selector; ball-only, computable from S)

hidden_U.role: confounder/masking target (full-obs teacher sees it; learner will not)

audit.note: epsilon is the ONLY changed mechanism; teacher config hash identical across epsilon.

interpretation_note: Overlap diagnostics only. Improved overlap does NOT identify P(G|S,do(A)); hidden U may still make P(G|S,A)!=P(G|S,do(A)). No causal claim; no critic selection.
